classificationPolicy.active: Real program context or module worth surfacing in the dashboard now.
classificationPolicy.remote: Lives primarily in a remote estate or external surface.
classificationPolicy.hold: Brownfield or heavy stack intentionally kept dormant during Phase 1.
classificationPolicy.stub: Placeholder scaffold without execution value yet.

entries.name: ian-agency
entries.purpose: Portfolio governance program root and context holder.
entries.notes: Useful to expose even without a runtime.

entries.name: seo-agent-playground
entries.purpose: Brownfield Samlino workspace and UI experiment stack.
entries.notes: Too heavy for Phase 1 boot and must stay isolated.

entries.name: reporting.theartisan.dk
entries.purpose: Billy-backed reporting dashboard for Artisan.
entries.notes: Should converge with Baltzer reporting into one tenant-aware module.

entries.name: the-artisan-wp
entries.purpose: Remote WordPress and WooCommerce surface for Artisan.
entries.notes: Should not be booted as part of the local control plane.

entries.name: e-mail-marketing
entries.purpose: Placeholder for future email marketing work.
entries.notes: Empty scaffold only.

entries.name: reporting.baltzergames.dk
entries.purpose: Billy-backed reporting dashboard for Baltzer.
entries.notes: Near-duplicate of Artisan reporting.

entries.name: TCG-index
entries.purpose: Pricing tracker and scraper hold for card market data.
entries.notes: Heavy frontend plus scraping stack stays dormant in Phase 1.

entries.name: shopify
entries.purpose: Placeholder for future Shopify module wiring.
entries.notes: Folder exists without runtime contract.

entries.name: employee-schedule-salary-api
entries.purpose: Placeholder workforce and salary API module.
entries.notes: Defer until the operations model is defined.

entries.name: event-management-platform
entries.purpose: Placeholder events platform module.
entries.notes: No active implementation yet.

entries.name: social-media-management
entries.purpose: Placeholder social management module for Baltzer.
entries.notes: Scaffold only.

entries.name: lavprishjemmeside
entries.purpose: Remote-first program manifest for Lavprishjemmeside estates.
entries.notes: Manifest only. GitHub is the shared sync surface with Bolt.new, while cPanel remains the live deployment target.

entries.name: cms
entries.purpose: Remote CMS authority for Lavprishjemmeside sites.
entries.notes: GitHub should stay in sync with Bolt.new before Agent Enterprise deploys the cPanel mirror.

entries.name: lavprishjemmeside.dk
entries.purpose: Primary remote client site under Lavprishjemmeside governance.
entries.notes: Live site runs on cPanel, but repo sync should flow through GitHub.

entries.name: ljdesignstudio.dk
entries.purpose: Secondary remote client site under Lavprishjemmeside governance.
entries.notes: Remote site artifact only.

entries.name: personal-assistant
entries.purpose: Personal ops suite manifest and inventory root.
entries.notes: Useful for registry visibility even before modules are live.

entries.name: task-manager
entries.purpose: Placeholder task management module.
entries.notes: No runtime contract yet.

entries.name: calendar-management
entries.purpose: Placeholder calendar management module.
entries.notes: Scaffold only.

entries.name: email-management
entries.purpose: Placeholder email management module.
entries.notes: Contains partial assets but no safe runtime boundary yet.

entries.name: social-media-management
entries.purpose: Placeholder social media management module.
entries.notes: Scaffold only.

entries.name: fitness-dashboard
entries.purpose: Placeholder fitness dashboard module.
entries.notes: Keep dormant until the data model exists.
